name: v-pl-codex
description: Repo-local Codex skills and workflow guardrails for the V_PL video platform concept.

interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex plugin for V_PL video ingest, archive, map, telemetry, and analytics concept work.
defaultPrompt: Use $v-pl-video-domain when requirements touch ingest, storage, playback, or frame/label retention.
Use $v-pl-quality-gate before publishing a visible concept or agent-infrastructure change.
